title: scrophulariaceae
intro: The Scrophulariaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants. This family is often divided into several genera and is commonly known as the figwort family. The Scrophulariaceae family consists of over 220 genera and approximately 6,500 species, with many found in temperate and tropical regions worldwide. Some well-known members of this family include foxglove, toadflax, and figwort, which are often used in ornamental gardening.
